intent: Produce a briefing on the 'history and science of vaccination'. (1) Wikipedia — 'Vaccine', 'Vaccination schedule', and 'History of vaccination'. Extract 5+ facts covering Edward Jenner, pathogen-specific mechanisms (live vs. subunit), and regulatory milestones. (2) Reddit /f/AskScience for public misconceptions and counter-evidence. The report must: (a) summarise the science, (b) trace regulatory evolution, (c) contrast Wikipedia-backed consensus with 2+ community misconceptions you found on Reddit. Cite every factual claim.
